message:
feat(fp-index): add Index insert/delete/append/repeat/dropna parity (frankenpandas-wss2)

Five pandas-parity methods on Index, all preserving name() via the
existing propagate_name helper:

- insert(loc, item) — pd.Index.insert. loc in 0..=len(); OutOfBounds
  otherwise.
- delete(loc) — pd.Index.delete. OutOfBounds for loc >= len().
- append(other) — pd.Index.append. Concatenates labels.
- repeat(n) — pd.Index.repeat. 0 → empty, 1 → clone, else n copies
  per label contiguously.
- dropna() — pd.Index.dropna. Filters labels where is_missing() is
  true.

Closes frankenpandas-wss2 (insert) and co-lands
frankenpandas-5lvf/amq9/oay5/6fpo which share the same call site and
test surface.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
